title: Hiring Simulator
askAiPrompt: I’m considering hiring {headcount} people costing {monthlyCost}/month ({annualCost}/year). Current net profit: {netProfit}, runway: {runway} months. After hiring: net profit drops to {newNetProfit}, runway to {newRunway} months. I need {revenueNeeded}/month extra revenue to maintain margins. Should I hire now or wait?
subtitle: Model the financial impact of new hires on your P&L and cash runway before committing.
insightRevenueNeeded: Revenue needed to break even on hires
insightRevenuePerHire: Revenue per hire to cover cost
warningLoss: Hiring puts you into a loss — ensure revenue growth covers cost
runwayAlertValue: Only {n} months after hiring — consider timing or phased hiring
healthyRunwayValue: {n} months — comfortable buffer for new hires
